disclaimers.side_effects: Please discontinue use immediately and consult a qualified healthcare professional. Individual responses to cosmetic products may vary.
disclaimers.product_quality: All MosaicWellness products undergo rigorous quality testing. If you have a concern about a specific batch, please share the batch number printed on your packaging.
disclaimers.trust_authenticity: Genuine MosaicWellness products carry a unique QR code. Please verify authenticity at our official website.

escalationInstructions.side_effects: DM your contact details for our medical safety team to reach you directly.
escalationInstructions.trust_authenticity: Please DM us the seller name and your order details so we can take immediate action.
escalationInstructions.default: Please share your order ID via DM so we can resolve this privately and quickly.

startWith: We understand how frustrating this must be.
We truly care about your experience.
Your health and satisfaction come first.
Thank you for bringing this to our attention.
We are treating this as a priority.
This has been escalated to our senior team.
